metadata.description: Workload name; used to compose resource names.
Object ID of the principal granted data-plane access (e.g., your dev account or CI SP).
Deploy Azure Container Apps environment. Default: off in dev (run locally), on in demo/prod.
Deploy Azure Cosmos DB. Default: off in dev (no persistence required), on in demo/prod.
Deploy Azure API Management. Default: prod only.
Object ID granted Reader on Application Insights (Foundry tracing UI).
Object ID of the principal granted Foundry User (data-plane). Empty = skip.
Object ID of the principal granted Storage Blob Data Contributor. Empty = skip.
Object ID of the Foundry account managed identity (read-only access). Empty = skip.
Object ID of the principal granted Search data-plane roles. Empty = skip.
Object ID of the Foundry account managed identity (read-only access). Empty = skip.
